name: Figma Make Preview Verification And Patch-State Ledger

gitState.sourceShapeFinding: origin/main is a Figma Make source tree under src/app/**, while the current implementation checkout carries production/readiness work under the current local src/** shape. Do not treat non-src runtime/provider diffs as Figma Make patch files.

exclude: provider credentials or provider readback files
figmaMakeSyncPolicy.reason: Figma Make is a source/preview surface. Production runtime, static assets, provider, and verification artifacts belong to the deployment repository workflow, not the Figma Make patch list.

verifiedPresentInFigmaMakePush.evidence: git grep -n "CONTACT_INFO" origin/main -- src package.json returned no hits.

verifiedPresentInFigmaMakePush.finding: Public internal audit strings from the service content gate are absent for the checked patterns
verifiedPresentInFigmaMakePush.evidence: git grep -n -E "CONTACT_INFO|Content review|Business/service owner review required|growth-ready|booking_completed" origin/main -- src/app returned no hits.

verifiedPresentInFigmaMakePush.finding: Service route promotion helper and route registry exist in Figma Make source
verifiedPresentInFigmaMakePush.evidence: origin/main contains getPromotedServiceDetailPathForServiceId and serviceSeoRouteRegistry in src/app/i18n/dictionaries/serviceSeo.ts and related service page imports.

verifiedPresentInFigmaMakePush.finding: Product owner-verified review gating exists in Figma Make source
verifiedPresentInFigmaMakePush.evidence: origin/main contains review_source and owner_verified checks in src/app/components/catalog/ProductDetailPage.tsx.

mismatches.finding: Figma Make source still contains public [TBD] price and duration placeholders in legacy service pages.
mismatches.impact: These placeholders are public content defects and fail content safety/readiness gates for service SEO.
mismatches.requiredPatch: Replace [TBD] public price/duration placeholders with owner-safe values already present locally: service.vehicleSpecificQuote, service.durationConfirmedInBooking, Tire Change 30 EUR passenger, Tire Change 35 EUR SUV, and vehicle-specific quote for van.

mismatches.finding: Figma Make browser preview smoke was not run in this task.
mismatches.impact: Git source sync can confirm pushed code state, but it cannot prove Figma Make runtime import state, render state, or console cleanliness.
mismatches.requiredPatch: Provide or verify the current Figma Make preview URL, then smoke homepage, service page, contact, catalog, product, checkout, and error route with console capture.

mismatches.finding: The pushed Figma Make source is on origin/main, while the current implementation branch is codex/pwa-cloudflare.
mismatches.impact: A blind merge would mix a Figma Make src/app/** restructure with production runtime files and can delete or hide local SEO/runtime checks.
mismatches.requiredPatch: Resolve source-of-truth branch policy before merging. Keep Figma Make file patching limited to src/app/** unless an explicit deployment migration is opened.

commands.command: git grep -n "CONTACT_INFO" origin/main -- src package.json || true
git grep -n -E "CONTACT_INFO|Content review|Business/service owner review required|growth-ready|booking_completed" origin/main -- src/app || true

next: E-2 - Production Crawl, Rendered Head, Schema, And Browser Matrix
readinessDecision: E-1 source ledger is complete. Figma Make preview parity remains blocked until the four service placeholder patches are applied in Figma Make and browser preview smoke is captured.
